safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: Canonical registry of public routes for the Am I Fundable mini-site.

pages.title: Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.summary: Primary landing page introducing the free funding readiness scorecard.
pages.safe_positioning: Educational readiness guidance; not a funding decision.

pages.title: Run the Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.safe_positioning: Scores readiness based on self-reported answers and recommends next steps.

pages.title: Understand Your Funding Readiness Result
pages.summary: Public-safe explainer for score tiers, next steps, and manual review.
pages.safe_positioning: Explains readiness ranges without implying eligibility or offers.

pages.title: Funding Paths Explained
pages.summary: Explains public funding families without exposing partner-specific logic.
pages.safe_positioning: Describes possible funding lanes, not final matches.

pages.title: Funding Document Prep Checklist
pages.summary: Practical checklist for documents commonly requested during review.
pages.safe_positioning: Helps users prepare a cleaner file for human review.

pages.title: Broker Scorecard Workflow
pages.summary: Broker-facing pitch for using the scorecard to improve lead triage.
pages.safe_positioning: Lead triage and readiness workflow, not automated underwriting.

pages.title: Partner With the Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.safe_positioning: Educational referral and readiness routing, not a promise of funding.

pages.title: White-Label Funding Readiness Scorecard
pages.safe_positioning: Client-facing readiness tool with human review guardrails.

pages.title: Scorecard Embed Example
pages.summary: Demo page showing how the widget can sit inside another page.
pages.safe_positioning: Demonstrates the public widget surface only.

pages.title: Scorecard Submitted
pages.summary: Post-submit next steps and review expectations.
pages.safe_positioning: Confirms submission received for review, not a funding decision.

pages.title: Build Funding Readiness First
pages.summary: Nurture and recovery path for low readiness users.
pages.safe_positioning: Focuses on readiness repair steps before applying.

pages.title: Funding Review Recommended
pages.summary: Manual review path for warm or mixed-profile leads.
pages.safe_positioning: A human should review the file before any next-step recommendation.

pages.title: High Readiness Strategy Review
pages.summary: High-readiness next-step page for users with stronger files.
pages.safe_positioning: Encourages a fast strategy review without implying approval.

pages.title: Funding Readiness Resources
pages.summary: Index of checklists, guides, FAQs, and tools.
pages.safe_positioning: Educational resources for readiness and preparation.

pages.title: Funding Readiness FAQ
pages.summary: SEO-friendly questions and answers about the scorecard.
pages.safe_positioning: Clarifies what the tool does and does not do.

pages.title: Privacy and Data Use
pages.summary: Public privacy and data-use page for lead capture trust.
pages.safe_positioning: Plain-language explanation of collected data and intended use.

pages.title: Terms and Funding Readiness Disclaimer
pages.safe_positioning: States the scorecard is educational and not a funding offer.
